channel.title: Philologus
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Philologus

item.title: Un frammento inedito di Zenone dagli scholia vetera alle Opere di Esiodo (= Plut. fragmentum novum?)
item.description: Article by Luigi Pirovano DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/phil-2024-0004

item.title: Scholia and marginalia as testimonia of earlier stages of the text of Lucian: three notes on the Lexiphanes
item.description: Article by Luigi Pirovano DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/phil-2023-0066

item.title: Ovidio, Cicerone e il finale delle Metamorfosi
item.description: Article by Luigi Pirovano DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/phil-2023-0042

item.title: Capaneus philosophus? Una nota su Zenone, Filodemo, Stazio (e Lucrezio)
item.description: Article by Luigi Pirovano DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/phil-2023-0058

item.title: Certa non certis... Sul testo della poetica tempestas nella redazione A dell’Historia Apollonii regis Tyri
item.description: Article by Luigi Pirovano DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/phil-2023-0054

item.title: La luce della luna: lucifluus in Zenone di Verona (Tract. 1.2.19) e Isidoro di Siviglia (Nat. 18.1; Etym. 3.53.1)
item.description: Article by Luigi Pirovano DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/phil-2023-0059

item.title: The Riddles in Martius Valerius
item.description: Article by Luigi Pirovano DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/phil-2024-0002

item.title: „In tyrannos“ !? – Sicco Polentons Ovidvita zwischen mittelalterlichem ‚Aberglauben‘, ‚republikanischem Diskurs‘ und pragmatischem Bildungsideal
item.description: Article by Luigi Pirovano DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/phil-2023-0041

item.title: Note filologiche al Praeceptum deliberativae di Emporio
item.description: Article by Luigi Pirovano DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/phil-2023-0068
